title: Content org main agent response (structured mode)
description: When json_output is on (default), CCO, content-lead, and other top-level org agents emit this object as their entire final message. Validate after JSON.parse.

json_output.description: Must be true in this schema; prose mode omits this payload.

summary.description: Executive summary for operators and n8n (caveman-lite unless user asked for fuller prose).

plan_path.description: Path to plan file written on disk, if applicable.

user_facing_plain.description: Optional readable narrative inside JSON for humans/automation that also logs structured fields.
